The '''''Blackstar''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] held in reserve during the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] upgrade operation for the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Laantis]]'' months after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

{{Ship-stub}}
